doc_name: What the ‘One Nation, Overcharged’ Campaign Aims to Achieve

chunks.text: One Nation, Overcharged, a campaign backed by the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation, launched to raise awareness of rising healthcare costs. The post What the ‘One Nation, Overcharged’ Campaign Aims to Achieve appeared first on MedCity News.
